nodes.name: Lowland akalat
nodes.summary: Lowland akalat（Sheppardia cyornithopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Lowland akalat。

nodes.name: Sheppardia
nodes.summary: Sheppardia（Sheppardia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Grey-winged robin-chat、Bocage's akalat、Lowland akalat等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lowland akalat
nodes.summary: The lowland akalat (Sheppardia cyornithopsis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. Its disjunct range extends across the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References
